description: Create a Fitts' Law reciprocal pointing experiment in PsychoPy Builder. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/fitts_law/conditions/fitts_targets.csv containing 12 trials based on Amplitudes (0.4, 0.6, 0.8), Widths (0.05, 0.10), and Directions (-1 for Left, 1 for Right). The CSV must include columns target_w, target_amp, direction, and pos_x, where pos_x is calculated as (target_amp / 2) * direction. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/fitts_law/fitts_task.psyexp using 'height' units. The experiment must include a central gray home position (size 0.04) and a red target (size $target_w at ($pos_x, 0)) that advance upon mouse click and record timing data, with the trial sequence linked to the conditions file.
